creator: john@saltant.com
text:
The upstream master site (https://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/) evidently hosts source for only the current version (currently 1.0.2).

An excerpt from the poudriere log:

=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
===>  License GPLv3 accepted by the user
=> spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.caida.org/projects/spoofer/downloads/spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/spoofer-1.0.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/spoofer
